items.title: Gary O’Neil to lead Ipswich on top-flight return as Oxford appoint Aaron Ramsey
items.summary: O’Neil signs three-year deal after spell at Strasbourg Oxford United hire Wales legend after relegation Ipswich have unveiled Gary O’Neil as their new manager as they prepare for their return to the Premier League. items.title: Trump will present World Cup trophy to winners, confirms Infantino
Trump to attend World Cup final and present trophy
items.summary: United States president Donald Trump will attend the World Cup final and help present the trophy, says Fifa president Gianni Infantino.
